---
title: "About Me"
---

::: {.hero-banner .text-center}

<img src="images/profile.jpg" alt="add photo to /images" class="rounded-circle mb-3" width="160">

<h1>Carter King</h1>

<a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/carter-king1/" class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm" target="_blank">
  <i class="fab fa-linkedin"></i> LinkedIn
</a>
<a href="https://github.com/ck22coding" class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm" target="_blank">
  <i class="fab fa-github"></i> GitHub
</a>

:::

## Background

Strategic Management student at BYU's Marriott School of Business with a focus on the intersection of strategy and technology. I'm drawn to complex problems that require both analytical rigor and creative thinking—whether that's building AI-powered tools for deal origination or analyzing investment opportunities across industries.

## Internships

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### Revi.Ai
*Applied AI*
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### Vermilion Rock Advisors
*Investment Banking*
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### Ironclad Growth Partners
*Private Equity*
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### Colliers International
*Valuation*
:::

:::

## Education

- **Strategic Management**, BYU Marriott School of Business (Class of 2028)
- **GPA**: 3.80 / 4.00
- **Associations**: Management Consulting, Private Equity & Venture Capital, AI in Business

## Skills

**Technical**

- AI/ML tools, prompt engineering, agentic workflows
- Web scraping, database extraction, Clay platform

**Financial**

- LBO & DCF modeling, due diligence
- Market analysis, valuations

**Languages**

- English, Croatian, Serbian, Bosnian

## What's Next

I'm building at the intersection of strategy and technology. This summer I'm joining **BYU Sandbox**, a venture-scale startup program, to take a product from idea to launch. I'm looking for opportunities where analytical thinking meets real-world impact.
